description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows Builds that runs on push to master and github_actions branches and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix strategy to run two windows-latest jobs, one for Editor build and one for Release build, each with different configuration. For each job, clone the Godot repository and a module, load and upload the .scons_cache directory, set up Python 3.x, install scons and pywin32, compile the project with scons, and upload the resulting executable as an artifact.
